title: Standings calculation only covers Brasileirão, not Copa do Brasil or Libertadores
evidence: src/queries/competitions.ts:brasileiraoStandings hardcodes competition=BRASILEIRAO; league_standings/competition_champion tools accept only a season, not a competition
suggestion: R9 asks for 'season standings from match results' and is satisfied for the one league with a round-robin table; the cup/Libertadores are knockout formats where a points table is less meaningful, so this is a reasonable scoping choice, noted for cross-run comparison

title: 2022 Brasileirão fixtures are incomplete in the provided data
evidence: agent noted (in _agent_stdout.log) that late-2022 fixtures have no scores; filterMatches with playedOnly drops them, so 2022 team/season queries reflect a partial season
suggestion: Data-source limitation, not a code defect; tests correctly assert exact counts against complete seasons (2019/2021) instead

title: BR-Football-Dataset rows with an empty tournament column are labelled 'Unknown'
suggestion: Acceptable fallback; such rows are still queryable by team/date and excluded from competition-scoped queries — worth noting as a data-normalization edge case
